item.title: dancing inc
item.description:
noose ended strings,

descended to the ground,

and hooked around loose limbs. 

deprived of gravity it warps,

with the lift of dirty forks, 

like a unison of 34 bjorks it sings 

the summon of an undead corpse. 

metal rings, ching chings

but the heart burn still stings

and brings parasitic storks to wings. 

the pill’s trip was grim

just saw wide eyed grins claw at

ovoid pupils void of quadruples

item.title: faulty cables
item.description:
faulty cables,
tools we can’t handle,
tennis tables,
right angle.
corporate claw,
from yams to yaml, 
lip took the last sip
from the camel’s paw,
tension in the jaw,
elastic resistance 
to binary law.

item.title: fib
item.description:
faust ticks boxes into perimetry
as the alien licks shadows of the symmetry
faced to shine patchy
before blinding grace’s fibonacci

item.title: lost in the mirror
item.description:
it’s finding yourself 
lost in the mirror
when the structure revs a gear
that sings your ear to the shelf
the elf winding bind drifts near 
before indicating a kind
of professional steer
across the dead feet of your cardboard crowd’s cheer
grinding to a cult
cutting you off from the rear
leaping back to the year
you forgot to toss for a 2 sided sear
when weeping flooded you with fear
and trapped fresh air into bubbles of beer

item.title: pariah
item.description:
authentically a pariah
caring will but no longer a christmas present for mariah
snaring grey delay but still cosmetically a papaya

item.title: psychological loots
item.description:
the iris shoots
alien fruits
at bubbly boots
to help them ascend…
their roots.
psychological loots
cut ties into suits 
bands sling tributes
wrapped by denial 
to wring into a sap of style

item.title: shrieked
item.description:
shrieked when she shrunk 
from the axe to the trunk

diet restricts
imagery junk

running from your scripted funk

interrogating dreams
chunk by chunk
lie it down
the bed was bunk

item.title: trust
item.description:
all i trust is disgust

and the freedom monger’s uncontrollable lust

leaves of lettuce enshrined in moldable dust

ghosts that you will never bust

red flag that you sussed, but are everywhere and not worthy of being fussed
